mapper.select: SELECT MEM_ID FROM WH_MEMBER WHERE MEM_TOKEN = #{token} AND MEM_USE_YN = 1

SELECT M.MEM_ID, MEM_NAME, MEM_INTRODUCTION, MEM_STAR, MEM_STAR_CHG, IFNULL(HEART,0) HEART, IFNULL(HEART_CHG,0) HEART_CHG, MEM_TOKEN, MEM_AGREEMENT, MEM_TYPE, MEM_PICTURE, MEM_USE_YN ,IFNULL(PRICE,0) PRICE ,IFNULL(PRICE_CHG,0) PRICE_CHG ,IFNULL(CONTENT_CNT,0) CONTENT_CNT ,IFNULL(RECENT_HRT_CHG, 0) RECENT_HRT_CHG ,IFNULL(RECENT_HRT_NAME, '') RECENT_HRT_NAME ,(SELECT COUNT(MEM_ID) FROM WH_FOLLOW W WHERE M.MEM_ID = W.MEM_ID) FOLLOWING_CNT ,(SELECT COUNT(MEM_ID) FROM WH_FOLLOW W WHERE M.MEM_ID = W.FOLLOW_ID) FOLLOWER_CNT FROM WH_MEMBER M LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT C.MEM_ID, SUM(A.CON_PRICE) PRICE , SUM(A.CON_PRICE_CHG) PRICE_CHG FROM WH_CONTENT M, WH_PRICE A ,WH_MEMBER C WHERE 1=1 AND M.CON_ID = A.CON_ID AND M.PRS_ID = C.MEM_ID AND MEM_TOKEN = #{MEM_TOKEN} GROUP BY C.MEM_ID ) A ON (M.MEM_ID = A.MEM_ID ) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT WM.MEM_ID, COUNT(*) CONTENT_CNT FROM WH_CONTENT WC, WH_MEMBER WM WHERE 1=1 AND WC.PRS_ID = WM.MEM_ID GROUP BY WM.MEM_ID ) B ON (M.MEM_ID = B.MEM_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT C.MEM_ID, SUM(A.CON_HEART) HEART , SUM(A.CON_HEART_CHG) HEART_CHG FROM WH_CONTENT M, WH_HEART A ,WH_MEMBER C WHERE 1=1 AND M.CON_ID = A.CON_ID AND M.PRS_ID = C.MEM_ID AND MEM_TOKEN = #{MEM_TOKEN} GROUP BY C.MEM_ID ) C ON (M.MEM_ID = C.MEM_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT a.PRS_ID AS MEM_ID, a.CON_HEART_CHG AS RECENT_HRT_CHG, b.MEM_NAME AS RECENT_HRT_NAME FROM WH_HEART a LEFT OUTER JOIN WH_MEMBER b ON a.MEM_ID = b.MEM_ID WHERE a.PRS_ID = #{MEM_ID} AND a.CON_HEART_CHG > 0 ORDER BY HRT_ID DESC LIMIT 1 ) D ON (M.MEM_ID = D.MEM_ID) WHERE 1=1 AND MEM_TOKEN = #{MEM_TOKEN}

SELECT M.MEM_ID, M.MEM_NAME, M.MEM_PICTURE, M.MEM_INTRODUCTION, (SELECT COUNT(MEM_ID) FROM WH_FOLLOW W WHERE M.MEM_ID = W.MEM_ID) FOLLOWING_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(MEM_ID) FROM WH_FOLLOW W WHERE M.MEM_ID = W.FOLLOW_ID) FOLLOWER_CNT, (CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT NULL FROM WH_FOLLOW WF WHERE WF.FOLLOW_ID = #{PROFILE_ID} AND WF.MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) IS_FOLLOWING FROM WH_MEMBER M WHERE M.MEM_ID = #{PROFILE_ID}

SELECT P.PRS_ID AS MEM_ID, P.PRS_NAME AS MEM_NAME, P.STORED_FILE_NM AS MEM_PICTURE, '' MEM_INTRODUCTION, (SELECT COUNT(MEM_ID) FROM WH_FOLLOW W WHERE P.PRS_ID = W.MEM_ID) FOLLOWING_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(MEM_ID) FROM WH_FOLLOW W WHERE P.PRS_ID = W.FOLLOW_ID) FOLLOWER_CNT, (CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT NULL FROM WH_FOLLOW WF WHERE WF.FOLLOW_ID = #{PROFILE_ID} AND WF.MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) IS_FOLLOWING FROM WH_PRESS P WHERE P.PRS_ID = #{PROFILE_ID}
SELECT MEM_ID FROM WH_FACEBOOK WHERE FB_KEY = #{FB_KEY}
SELECT MEM_ID FROM WH_KAKAOTALK WHERE KT_KEY = #{KT_KEY}
SELECT MEM_ID FROM WH_APPLE WHERE AP_KEY = #{AP_KEY}
SELECT MEM_ID FROM WH_GOOGLE WHERE GO_KEY = #{GO_KEY}

SELECT MAX(MEM_ID) AS MEM_ID FROM (SELECT CONCAT(SUBSTR(MEM_ID, 1, 8), LPAD(SUBSTR(MEM_ID, 9, 6) + 1, 5, '0')) AS MEM_ID FROM (SELECT MAX(MEM_ID) AS MEM_ID FROM WH_MEMBER WHERE SUBSTR(MEM_ID, 1, 8) = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d')) MAX_MEM_ID UNION ALL SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '00001') AS MEM_ID) A

SELECT WM.MEM_ID, WM.MEM_TYPE, WM.MEM_NAME, WM.MEM_STAR, WM.MEM_STAR_CHG, WM.MEM_AGREEMENT, WM.MEM_TOKEN, WM.MEM_USE_YN, WM.MEM_PICTURE ,IFNULL(PRICE,0) PRICE ,IFNULL(PRICE_CHG,0) PRICE_CHG ,IFNULL(HEART,0) HEART ,IFNULL(HEART_CHG,0) HEART_CHG ,IFNULL(CONTENT_CNT,0) CONTENT_CNT ,IFNULL(RECENT_HRT_CHG,0) RECENT_HRT_CHG ,IFNULL(RECENT_HRT_NAME,'') RECENT_HRT_NAME ,WM.MEM_CREATE_DATE FROM WH_MEMBER WM LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT C.MEM_ID, SUM(A.CON_PRICE) PRICE , SUM(A.CON_PRICE_CHG) PRICE_CHG FROM WH_CONTENT M, WH_PRICE A ,WH_MEMBER C WHERE 1=1 AND M.CON_ID = A.CON_ID AND M.PRS_ID = C.MEM_ID AND M.PRS_ID = #{MEM_ID} GROUP BY C.MEM_ID ) A ON (WM.MEM_ID = A.MEM_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT WM.MEM_ID, COUNT(*) CONTENT_CNT FROM WH_CONTENT WC, WH_MEMBER WM WHERE 1=1 AND WC.PRS_ID = WM.MEM_ID GROUP BY WM.MEM_ID ) B ON (WM.MEM_ID = B.MEM_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT C.MEM_ID, SUM(A.CON_HEART) HEART , SUM(A.CON_HEART_CHG) HEART_CHG FROM WH_CONTENT M, WH_HEART A ,WH_MEMBER C WHERE 1=1 AND M.CON_ID = A.CON_ID AND M.PRS_ID = C.MEM_ID AND M.PRS_ID = #{MEM_ID} GROUP BY C.MEM_ID ) C ON (WM.MEM_ID = C.MEM_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT a.PRS_ID AS MEM_ID, a.CON_HEART_CHG AS RECENT_HRT_CHG, b.MEM_NAME AS RECENT_HRT_NAME FROM WH_HEART a LEFT OUTER JOIN WH_MEMBER b ON a.MEM_ID = b.MEM_ID WHERE a.PRS_ID = #{MEM_ID} AND a.CON_HEART_CHG > 0 ORDER BY HRT_ID DESC LIMIT 1 ) D ON (WM.MEM_ID = D.MEM_ID) WHERE 1=1 AND WM.MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_MEMBER (MEM_ID, APP_ID, MEM_TYPE, MEM_NAME, MEM_PICTURE, MEM_TOKEN) VALUES (#{MEM_ID}, #{APP_ID}, #{MEM_TYPE}, #{MEM_NAME}, #{MEM_PICTURE}, #{MEM_TOKEN})
INSERT INTO WH_MEMBER (MEM_ID, APP_ID, MEM_TYPE, MEM_NAME, MEM_PICTURE, MEM_TOKEN) VALUES (#{MEM_ID}, #{APP_ID}, #{MEM_TYPE}, #{MEM_NAME}, #{MEM_PICTURE}, #{MEM_TOKEN})
INSERT INTO WH_FACEBOOK (MEM_ID, FB_KEY, FB_PICTURE, FB_TOKEN, FB_TOKEN_EXPD) VALUES (#{MEM_ID}, #{FB_KEY}, #{FB_PICTURE}, #{FB_TOKEN}, #{FB_TOKEN_EXPD})
INSERT INTO WH_KAKAOTALK (MEM_ID, KT_KEY, KT_PICTURE, KT_TOKEN, KT_TOKEN_EXPD) VALUES (#{MEM_ID}, #{KT_KEY}, #{KT_PICTURE}, #{KT_TOKEN}, #{KT_TOKEN_EXPD})
INSERT INTO WH_APPLE (MEM_ID, AP_KEY, AP_TOKEN, AP_CONTENT) VALUES (#{MEM_ID}, #{AP_KEY}, #{AP_KEY}, #{AP_CONTENT})
INSERT INTO WH_GOOGLE (MEM_ID, GO_KEY, GO_PICTURE, GO_TOKEN, GO_TOKEN_EXPD) VALUES (#{MEM_ID}, #{GO_KEY}, #{GO_PICTURE}, #{GO_TOKEN}, #{GO_TOKEN_EXPD})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM WH_FACEBOOK WHERE FB_KEY = #{FB_KEY} AND MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID}
mapper.update: UPDATE WH_MEMBER SET MEM_AGREEMENT = 1 WHERE MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID}
UPDATE WH_MEMBER SET MEM_AGREEMENT = #{MEM_AGREEMENT}, MEM_STAR = #{MEM_STAR}, MEM_STAR_CHG = #{MEM_STAR_CHG}, MEM_USE_YN = #{MEM_USE_YN} WHERE MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT APP_ID FROM WH_PRESS WHERE 1=1 AND APP_AUTH_KEY = #{APP_AUTH_KEY}
SELECT * FROM WH_FOLLOW WHERE MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID} AND FOLLOW_ID = #{FOLLOW_ID}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM WH_FOLLOW WHERE (MEM_ID=#{MEM_ID} AND FOLLOW_ID=#{FOLLOW_ID}) OR (MEM_ID=#{FOLLOW_ID} AND FOLLOW_ID=#{MEM_ID})
mapper.select:
SELECT F.*, M.MEM_NAME FOLLOW_NAME, M.MEM_PICTURE FOLLOW_PICTURE, (CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT NULL FROM WH_FOLLOW WF WHERE WF.FOLLOW_ID = F.FOLLOW_ID AND WF.MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID}) OR F.FOLLOW_ID = #{MEM_ID} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) IS_FOLLOWING, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM WH_USER_MESSAGE A WHERE A.SEND_MEM_ID = F.FOLLOW_ID AND A.RECEIVE_MEM_ID = #{PROFILE_ID} AND A.RECEIVE_DATE IS NULL AND A.DELETE_DATE IS NULL) AS NEW_CHAT_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM WH_USER_MESSAGE A WHERE A.SEND_MEM_ID = F.FOLLOW_ID AND A.RECEIVE_MEM_ID = #{PROFILE_ID} AND A.DELETE_DATE IS NULL) AS CHAT_COUNT FROM WH_FOLLOW F INNER JOIN WH_MEMBER M ON F.FOLLOW_ID = M.MEM_ID WHERE F.MEM_ID = #{PROFILE_ID}
AND M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%${KEYWORD}%'

SELECT F.FOLLOW_ID MEM_ID, M.MEM_ID FOLLOW_ID, F.FOLLOW_DATE, M.MEM_NAME FOLLOW_NAME, M.MEM_PICTURE FOLLOW_PICTURE, (CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT NULL FROM WH_FOLLOW WF WHERE WF.FOLLOW_ID = M.MEM_ID AND WF.MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID}) OR F.MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) IS_FOLLOWING, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM WH_USER_MESSAGE A WHERE A.SEND_MEM_ID = M.MEM_ID AND A.RECEIVE_MEM_ID = #{PROFILE_ID} AND A.DELETE_DATE IS NULL) AS CHAT_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM WH_USER_MESSAGE A WHERE A.SEND_MEM_ID = M.MEM_ID AND A.RECEIVE_MEM_ID = #{PROFILE_ID} AND A.RECEIVE_DATE IS NULL AND A.DELETE_DATE IS NULL) AS NEW_CHAT_COUNT FROM WH_FOLLOW F INNER JOIN WH_MEMBER M ON F.MEM_ID = M.MEM_ID WHERE F.FOLLOW_ID = #{PROFILE_ID}
AND M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%${KEYWORD}%'
SELECT COUNT(*) UNREAD_COUNT FROM WH_USER_MESSAGE WHERE RECEIVE_MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID} AND RECEIVE_DATE IS NULL AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL
SELECT FCM_TOKEN FROM WH_MEMBER WHERE MEM_ID = #{RECEIVE_MEM_ID}
SELECT MEM_NAME FROM WH_MEMBER WHERE MEM_ID = #{SEND_MEM_ID}
